title: Compacting
body:
# Compacting

An intelligent compact chat mod for Fabric, inspired by the behavior of same feature from [Patcher].

Instead of having a few dozen separate chat messages consisting of the same message, this mod compacts them into one message with a counter showing the amount of times that the message was repeated.

## Why Compacting?

This differs from other mods like [Chat Patches] and [Compact Chat] in a few ways:

- It does one thing, and aims to do that one thing well
- Messages are compacted based on how long ago they were last seen, instead of by comparing nearby chat messages
- It correctly handles dividers sent across multiple chat messages (like the ones sent by Hypixel):  
  ![Image: The chat messages between the dividers are compacted, while preserving the dividers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/940f8fc606e2ca1e21c8d05f4a99f4b9b89c2461.png)

## Configuration

If both [Mod Menu] and [YACL] are installed, the mod provides a few configuration options to control when a message should be compacted, as well as an optional setting to remove blank chat messages.

[Patcher]: https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher
[Compact Chat]: https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-chat
[Chat Patches]: https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches
[Mod Menu]: https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu
[YACL]: https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl
